raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX Dear Representative, American Express continues to engage in intentional, deceptive, and abusive billing practices that violate my consumer rights as evidenced by the following : Exhibit 1 is the written policy from American Express stating that I do not have to pay on the account while my account is in dispute. 
Exhibit 2 is the letter from American Express dated XX/XX/2024 which provides 30 days for me to provide additional information to support my dispute. 
Exhibit 3 is the XX/XX/2024 billing payment from American Express which is in direct contradiction of their written policy. 
Exhibit 4 is the screen shot of the additional dispute information that I attempted to uploaded to American Express on XX/XX/2024 at XXXXXXXX XXXX. 
This screen shot clearly shows that the dispute was processed and closed simultaneously without review. 
Exhibit 5 shows where my account was blocked from additional dispute submissions on XX/XX/2024 while my account was in the written dispute timeline.

Exhibit 6 shows where American Express has a pattern of blocking consumer disputes. 
This has been a recurring act by American Express. This is a blatant violation of my consumer rights As a small business owner, strong business credit is our life-line. It is essential to my financial stability and operations. Therefore, in spite of these deceptive practices, I have continued to pay the account in order to protect my business credit. 
The actions of American Express have caused significant stress and financial harm, jeopardizing my ability to sustain my business. 
American Express failure to adhere to its own dispute resolution policies is not only harmful to small businesses but also represents a breach of trust in its relationship with consumers. I urgently request consumer protection intervention to address these systemic issues and prevent further harm to myself and others. 
I also request a full reversal of the entire balance of my account due to the mishandling of my dispute and the associated violations of my consumer rights. 
Thank you for your consumer protection. 
Respectfully,
